title: Kirby's Dreamland 3 - Sand Canyon 1
description:
Music from Kirby's Dreamland 3 for the SNES. This is Sand Canyon's first theme. It also plays in levels 3-1 and 3-5. Short lived, huh?

Over 7,000 views, yeehaw! Views and comments have sky-rocketed since that fad video thing, so I suppose I should be thankful. :P
